author: hollowstrawberry
description: Live audio player for the Audio cog with buttons for queue/pause/play/skip/rewind/previous/stop. Stays at the bottom of the chat for as long as there are people listening, and updates every 10 seconds. If you play music on Discord with your friends a lot you'll probably find this quite practical.
install_msg:
🎶 __**AudioPlayer**__
-# :warning: **Note:** Discord guidelines don't like when things update periodically without human input, even when it follows ratelimits, so use this at your own risk. It *should* be fine conceptually as it requires humans to be listening in voice chat, but I'm not sure.
```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load audioplayer
2a. Enable the player inside voice channels with [p]audioplayer auto
2b. And/or set a dedicated channel for the player with [p]audioplayer dedicated```
short: Live audio player with buttons for the audio cog.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
